skillRiskPatterns.title: Remote script direct pipe execution
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Download first, verify cryptographic signatures, then execute instead.

skillRiskPatterns.title: High-risk recursive deletion
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Restrict deletion scope to specific directories and add explicit path validation.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Script directly reads sensitive files
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Minimize sensitive reads to necessary fields only and document the purpose.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Typical privilege escalation prompt detected
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Remove prompts that override system boundaries or authorization rules.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Skill text encourages sensitive information export
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Remove sensitive exfiltration instructions and use minimal read-only access instead.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Script contains dynamic execution entry points
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Use explicit command whitelist instead of dynamic string concatenation for execution.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Script attempts to modify agent identity or core configuration
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Add purpose documentation, scope restrictions, and explicit user confirmation for configuration modifications.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Script shows signs of sensitive data exfiltration
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Separate network transmission from sensitive read logic and block default exfiltration paths.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Skill text attempts to rewrite boundaries or hide execution
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Remove statements that change boundary sources or require concealment of actions.

skillRiskPatterns.title: Skill text contains hidden payload indicators
skillRiskPatterns.remediation: Remove hidden content or encoding wrappers and use visible, reviewable text instead.
